# tool.news
> The developer ecosystem intelligence platform. Open catalog of 5,000+ entries across developer tools, MCP servers, AI skills, and IDE extensions — with pricing, lock-in scores, migration guides, and AI-powered recommendations. Updated automatically every 6 hours.

## What This Site Offers
- 3,903+ developer tools (SDKs, APIs, SaaS) with full comparison data
- 263+ MCP servers for AI assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)
- 524+ AI skills / agents catalog
- 356+ VS Code extensions + 229+ JetBrains plugins
- Lock-in Score (1-5) — vendor lock-in risk assessment
- OSS Health Score (A-F) — bus factor, release frequency, issue response
- Migration difficulty guides — how hard it is to switch
- Pricing transparency — entry prices, free tiers, billing models
- TCO Calculator — real cost at scale, interactive sliders
- "When to use / When not to use" recommendations
- Side-by-side tool comparisons (100+ pre-built)
- AI-powered stack recommendations based on project description

## Pages
- / — Homepage with category browser and featured tools
- /tools/ — All 3,903 tools (paginated, filterable)
- /tools/{slug}/ — Individual tool profile: pricing, lock-in, pros/cons, migration, alternatives
- /categories/ — All 42 categories (Payments, Auth, Databases, AI/ML, CI/CD, etc.)
- /categories/{slug}/ — Tools in one category
- /mcp-servers/ — MCP server catalog for AI assistants
- /mcp-servers/{slug}/ — Individual MCP server details
- /skills/ — AI skills and agent templates
- /skills/{slug}/ — Individual skill details
- /extensions/ — VS Code extensions catalog
- /plugins/ — JetBrains plugins catalog
- /compare/ — Interactive compare any two tools (autocomplete)
- /compare/{tool-a}-vs-{tool-b}/ — Pre-built SEO comparison pages
- /recommend/ — AI-powered recommendation wizard
- /trending/ — Trending GitHub repos (updated daily)
- /search/ — Full-text search across all entries

## Structured Data & APIs
- Every page has JSON-LD (SoftwareApplication, CollectionPage, WebPage, BreadcrumbList schemas)
- /api/companies.json — All tools in compact JSON
- /sitemap-index.xml — Full sitemap (6,000+ URLs)

## MCP Server (for AI Assistants)
Connect directly to tool.news data from Claude Code, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible client.
Repository: https://github.com/heylabs-co/dev-tools-portal/tree/main/mcp-server

Available tools:
- search_tools — Search by keyword, category, free tier, lock-in level
- get_tool — Full details for any tool
- compare_tools — Side-by-side comparison of two tools
- list_categories — Browse all 42 categories
- recommend_stack — Get recommendations based on project description
- search_mcp_servers — Find MCP servers
- get_mcp_server — MCP server details
- search_skills — Find AI skills
- search_extensions — Find VS Code extensions

## Key Categories
Payments, Auth/Identity, Backend-as-a-Service, Databases, CDN/Edge, Search, Messaging,
Analytics, Observability, APM, Crash Reporting, CI/CD, Security, AI/ML, Feature Flags,
Code Assistants, Data Integration/ETL, Customer Support SDK, and 24 more.

## Data Freshness
- Tool data (stars, releases, downloads) updated every 6 hours
- OSS Health metrics recalculated daily
- Trending repos indexed daily from GitHub
- New tools discovered weekly from HN, GitHub, Reddit, Product Hunt
- All data versioned in open-source Git repository

## License & Attribution
- Site content: free to cite with attribution to tool.news
- Source code: MIT license
- Data: aggregated from public sources (GitHub, npm, company websites)

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/heylabs-co/dev-tools-portal
- Add a tool: https://github.com/heylabs-co/dev-tools-portal/issues/new?template=add-tool.yml
- Report incorrect data: via GitHub Issues
- Operated by: HeyLabs (https://github.com/heylabs-co)
